symbols.name: IActiveEntityBehavior
symbols.summary: Defines the contract for behaviors in the Active Entities, providing hooks for operations like CRUD and queries.

syntax.content: public interface IActiveEntityBehavior where TEntity : class, IEntity

symbols.name: BeforeInsertAsync(TEntity, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Executes before an entity is inserted.

syntax.content: Task BeforeInsertAsync(TEntity entity, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The entity to be inserted.
A token to cancel the asynchronous operation.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous operation.

returns.description: A task representing the asynchronous operation.
